summary: P1 Improvements Testing Complete - All 7 features verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI changes verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/categories/l1 - Returns L1 categories
Backend: GET /api/categories/l2 - Returns L2 subcategories
Backend: POST /api/categories/l1 - Creates L1 category
Backend: PATCH /api/categories/l2/{id} with category_l1_id - Moves subcategory to different parent
Backend: PATCH /api/categories/l2/{id} to invalid parent - Returns 404
Backend: GET /api/logs/system - Returns logs from activity_logs collection
Backend: GET /api/logs/api - Returns API logs
Backend: GET /api/logs/ui - Returns UI logs
Backend: GET /api/logs/user - Returns user logs
Backend: GET /api/logs/invalid_type - Returns 400 for invalid log type
Backend: POST /api/logs - Creates log entry in activity_logs
Backend: GET /api/announcements - Returns announcements list
Backend: POST /api/announcements - Creates announcement
Backend: Expired announcements within 24h are retained
Backend: Scheduled announcements work correctly
Backend: GET /api/announcements/active - Returns active announcement for user
Backend: GET /api/announcements/active/all - Returns all active announcements
Backend: CategoryL2Update model accepts category_l1_id field
Frontend: Categories edit dialog shows Parent Category dropdown
Frontend: Categories edit dialog shows '(change to move)' hint
Frontend: Logs page has 'Live Stream' button with tooltip
Frontend: Logs page has 'Poll (5s)' button with tooltip
Frontend: Logs page has 'Download' button with tooltip
Frontend: Logs empty states show descriptive messages per log type
Frontend: Logs shows real data from activity_logs (no sample data)
Frontend: Announcements shows 'Expired (24h retention)' badge for expired items
critical_code_review_comments: CategoryL2Update model correctly includes optional category_l1_id field for moving subcategories
PATCH /api/categories/l2/{id} validates new parent exists and updates category_l1_name
Logs.js correctly shows descriptive empty state messages for each log type (system, api, ui, user)
Logs.js buttons have title attributes for tooltips (Live Stream, Poll 5s, Download)
Logs endpoints query activity_logs collection with source filter - no sample data
list_announcements filters out announcements expired > 24 hours and auto-deletes them
Announcements.js getStatusBadge shows 'Expired (24h retention)' for expired announcements
seed_data_creation: Test categories, logs, and announcements created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Improvements all verified working: 1) Categories now support moving subcategories to different L1 parents via PATCH /api/categories/l2/{id} with category_l1_id field - UI shows Parent Category dropdown with '(change to move)' hint in edit dialog, 2) Logs module improved with descriptive empty states for each log type, tooltips on controls (Live Stream, Poll 5s, Download), and real logs from activity_logs collection (no sample data), 3) Announcements retain expired items for 24 hours before auto-cleanup - UI shows 'Expired (24h retention)' badge for expired announcements.

categories_subcategory_move.description: Edit dialog shows Parent Category dropdown allowing move to different L1 with '(change to move)' hint

categories_backend_move.description: Accepts category_l1_id to move subcategory, validates new parent, updates category_l1_name

logs_empty_states.description: Descriptive messages for each log type (system, api, ui, user)

logs_control_tooltips.description: Live Stream, Poll (5s), Download buttons have title tooltips

logs_real_data.description: Logs from activity_logs collection, no sample data

announcements_24h_retention.description: Expired announcements retained for 24 hours then auto-deleted

announcements_expired_badge.description: Status badge shows 'Expired (24h retention)' for expired announcements
